rag_rules: Attach interface-facing contract content to a component type owner; attach implementation-only bindings to a component implementation owner.
If inserting into an implementation owner, place the annex after existing structural declarations such as subcomponents and connections.
generic_rules: Insert content only within the selected owner's declarative scope and preserve all existing architectural declarations.
Keep references within the visibility of the annex owner; implementation-only paths must stay in scopes where those paths are legal.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Keep surrounding AADL ordering and indentation intact so the edited owner remains syntactically well formed.
anti_patterns: Do not put subcomponent-path references into a type-owned contract block.
Do not split, reorder, or overwrite existing subcomponent, connection, or property sections when adding an annex.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
